name: CLSA Premium Limited
summary: CLSA Premium Limited, an investment holding company, provides leveraged foreign exchange, trading, cash dealing, and other services. It offers commodity and index trading, and margin dealing services, as well as precious metals trading and settlement services. The company also provides securities brokerage and management services. It primarily operates in Hong Kong, New Zealand, Australia, and the People's Republic of China. The company was formerly known as KVB Kunlun Financial Group Limited and changed its name to CLSA Premium Limited in November 2019. CLSA Premium Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong. CLSA Premium Limited is a subsidiary of Citic Securities Overseas Investment Company Limited.
